name: setup seed space opera faction voice is character driven

source.purpose: Pure Ch1 AuthorInputSeed coverage: Space Opera factionVoiceRules should align with the current genre bible and avoid old procedure-first station language.

seedJsonIncludes: Station hands and dock bosses are tired, competent, opinionated people
Corporate representatives sound smooth and transactional, but fear travels through them
Remnant officers carry the cadence of a law that used to mean something
Back-channel brokers say less than they know and price information by urgency
seedJsonExcludes: Station officials speak in berth priority, safety codes, route permission, and liability
Route access, docking, permits, reputation, debt, and cargo all become human leverage
